response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with deep experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the role demands 5–10 years of recent, hands-on C++ development on Windows plus SQL Server/Oracle and fixed-income or capital-markets domain expertise. His C++ exposure is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments over two decades ago and a university thesis project, his database experience centers on MongoDB and MySQL rather than SQL Server/Oracle, and his only finance-adjacent role (RIDE Capital) was web-stack work, not capital markets or fixed income. The core mandatory requirements are not met.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career with strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic)
Some professional C/C++ background (NI LabWindows/CVI) and systems-level programming in DLang
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ experience, and none on the Windows platform as required
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain experience; RIDE Capital was web-stack fintech only
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL

key_factors.factor: Missing mandatory C++ on Windows (5–10 yrs)
No fixed income / capital markets domain expertise
Strong general engineering fundamentals and testing culture
